synopsis: Their search for the frozen Han Solo narrowed to three bounty hunters, the Rebels split into teams. Leia and C-3PO track Dengar to Mandalore, where they land near the capital and stumble onto a slaver caravan herding enslaved Mandalorians. When Mandalorian soldiers who look like Boba Fett attack the slavers, Leia finds herself fighting alongside them. Their leader turns out to be *Fenn Shysa*, not Fett, and he brings the pair back to his camp, recounting how he and his surviving comrades have fought to free their people from the Empire since the Clone Wars. Shysa reveals he holds Dengar captive but refuses to hand him over, having planned to trade the hunter to the Empire for his imprisoned friend Tobbi Dala. Leia frees Dengar herself, distracting Shysa with a kiss before knocking him out, and escapes with the captive hunter. Unknown to her, Dengar has signaled the Empire, and she and C-3PO are ambushed by stormtroopers and an armored walker.
title: Star Wars (1977) #68: The Search Begins
